ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF'S/CROSS DEFENDANT'S MARK PINSUKANJANA AND BRIAN YEDINAK ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT KERRY MANSFIELD IS PRESENT. IT WAS DETERMINED BY JPT DAVID LAVINE DURING TESTIMONY THAT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND DEFENDANT'S CLAIM WILL BE DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE, FOR FAILURE OF PLAINTIFF'S TO SUE BY WAY OF THEIR CORPORATE ENTITY, AND FOR FAILURE OF DEFENDANT TO SUE THE CORRECT CORPORATE ENTITY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED. (506)
